description: Comprehensive alert management for critical infrastructure. Intelligent alerting, multi-channel notifications, and automated escalation workflows.

hero.headline: Never Miss a Critical Alert
hero.subheadline: Intelligent alerting reduces noise by 90% while ensuring critical issues reach the right people instantly. Configure once, respond faster.

sections.description: Flexible alert classification for appropriate response prioritization.

features.description: Immediate action required. Service impact or safety risk. Auto-escalation enabled.
features.title: Critical

features.description: Urgent attention needed. Potential service degradation if unaddressed.
features.title: High

features.description: Important but not urgent. Address within SLA timeframes.
features.title: Medium

features.description: Informational alerts for awareness. No immediate action required.
features.title: Low

sections.title: Alert Types & Severity

sections.description: Multi-channel alert delivery ensures your team gets notified.

features.description: Rich HTML emails with alert details, context, and action links.
features.title: Email

features.description: Text message alerts for critical incidents. Global coverage.
features.title: SMS

features.description: Automated voice calls for critical alerts. Text-to-speech.
features.title: Voice Call

features.description: Real-time notifications to Slack channels with interactive buttons.
features.title: Slack

features.description: Microsoft Teams notifications with adaptive cards.
features.title: Teams

features.description: Integration with PagerDuty for on-call management.
features.title: PagerDuty

features.description: Auto-create incidents in ServiceNow.
features.title: ServiceNow

features.description: Custom webhook endpoints for any integration.
features.title: Webhooks

features.description: iOS and Android push notifications via NXGEN app.
features.title: Mobile Push

sections.title: Notification Channels

sections.description: Automated escalation ensures critical alerts are never missed.

phases.description: Alert triggered by threshold breach or event

steps.description: System detects anomaly or receives external event and creates alert record.
steps.title: Alert Generated

steps.description: Alert enriched with context: station info, related devices, historical data.
steps.title: Enrichment

steps.description: Alert routed to appropriate team based on station assignment and alert type.
steps.title: Routing

phases.title: Initial Alert

steps.description: Primary on-call operator receives notification via configured channels.
steps.title: Notification Sent

steps.description: Operator has configurable window (default: 15 min) to acknowledge alert.
steps.title: Acknowledge Window

steps.description: Acknowledgment and response actions logged for audit trail.
steps.title: Response Logged

steps.description: If unacknowledged, alert escalated to secondary on-call or team lead.
steps.title: Level 2 Escalation

steps.description: Critical alerts escalate to management after extended window.
steps.title: Level 3 Escalation

steps.description: Non-critical alerts auto-resolve if conditions return to normal.
steps.title: Auto-Resolution

sections.title: Escalation Workflows

sections.description: Optimize your alert configuration for maximum effectiveness.

items.description: Use correlation rules to group related alerts and prevent notification storms.
items.title: Reduce Alert Noise

items.description: Ensure alerts reach the right people at the right time.
items.title: Right-Size Routing

items.description: Maintain audit trails and enable continuous improvement.
items.title: Document Everything

items.description: Ensure operators can respond effectively to any alert scenario.
items.title: Train Your Team

sections.description: Configure intelligent alerting that reduces noise while ensuring critical issues are never missed.

description: Complete tower and site monitoring solution. Track equipment health, environmental conditions, and security status across your entire infrastructure.

hero.headline: Monitor Every Site, Anywhere
hero.subheadline: From remote cell towers to urban data centers, NXGEN provides comprehensive site monitoring with real-time visibility into equipment health, environmental conditions, and security status.

benefits.description: Drill down from organization to device level in seconds
benefits.title: Quick Navigation

benefits.description: See status at any level with roll-up metrics
benefits.title: Aggregated Views

benefits.description: Adapt hierarchy to your operational needs

sections.description: Organize your infrastructure with our flexible 5-level hierarchy model.

levels.description: Top-level entity representing a company or business unit
levels.title: Organization

levels.description: Geographic or operational regions within an organization
levels.title: Region

levels.description: Grouped sites sharing common infrastructure or management
levels.title: Cluster

levels.description: Individual monitoring station (tower, data center, facility)

levels.description: Sensors, cameras, controllers, and equipment at each station
levels.title: Device

description: Comprehensive monitoring platform for tower sites, data centers, and critical infrastructure. Real-time visibility, intelligent alerting, and seamless integrations.

hero.headline: Complete Infrastructure Visibility
hero.subheadline: Monitor thousands of sites from a single pane of glass. NXGEN Technology AG delivers enterprise-grade monitoring for towers, data centers, and critical infrastructure.

sections.description: Built for scale, designed for operators. Our platform combines powerful monitoring with intuitive interfaces.

features.description: Monitor all your sites from a unified dashboard with real-time status updates and drill-down capabilities.
features.title: Multi-Site Dashboard

features.description: AI-powered alert correlation reduces noise by 90%. Get notified only when it matters.

features.description: Seamless CCTV integration with live feeds, playback, and AI-powered video analytics.

features.description: SOC 2 Type II certified with end-to-end encryption and role-based access control.

features.description: Deploy on-premise or cloud. Auto-scaling infrastructure handles any load.

features.description: RESTful APIs and webhooks for seamless integration with your existing tools.

features.description: Custom dashboards, trend analysis, and automated reporting for data-driven decisions.

capabilities.description: Continuous monitoring with sub-second data collection and instant anomaly detection.

capabilities.description: Long-term data storage for compliance, trend analysis, and historical investigations.

capabilities.description: Distributed edge nodes ensure low-latency access from anywhere in the world.
